narrative:
Ballville B (precinct in Sandusky County) has 406 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.4 percentage points.
